bead.title: Stage 2.2: Query resolver — node + projects
bead.description: Implement Query resolvers for `node` and `projects`. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_node.go. Wire to existing ServerState and project registry. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #15.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test for each query passes (real state). (2) MANUAL: in GraphiQL, run `{ node { id name } projects { id path name } }`, see real values matching `ddx status` and the project registry. Paste GraphiQL output into completion note.
